From: WCS Info <info@waltercuminns.com>
Sent: 13 November 2025 12:11
Subject: Walter Cuminns -Vessel Berthing Line as on 12/11/2025 - All Indian Ports !! WCS India

Please find attached the detailed berthing line-up of vessels scheduled to call at Indian seaports. At Walter Cuminns, we take pride in delivering timely, precise, and real-time intelligence, coupled with seamless assistance to ensure the smooth handling of your esteemed vessels across any Indian port.

About Walter Cuminns Group :
Walter Cuminns Group (WCG), established in 2021, has swiftly risen as a paragon of maritime service excellence, distinguishing itself in the competitive realm of shipping and logistics. With a strategic presence across key global locations including India, Sri Lanka, Indonesia, Malaysia, Singapore, Egypt, UAE, Bangladesh, and Spain, WCG has become synonymous with unparalleled service delivery, innovation, and client satisfaction in the maritime industry.
